read_policy: Use this file for active backlog, next actions, scanner counts, stable debt ids, and documentation hygiene follow-up. Historical detail lives in passes.jsonl/files.jsonl; do not recreate long markdown trackers for closed work.

notes: 2026-06-15 live scanner reports zero matches across all widget cleanup categories.

2026-06-15 whole-project analyzer hygiene pass applied 65 dart fix changes across import ordering, redundant default arguments, and initializing formals; flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos now reports no issues.
Raw test timing calls now route through shared pumpFeatureUi/pumpFeatureUiFor helpers in manual QA, golden, and UI capture harnesses.

Definition catalog now reports zero consolidation candidates after local private-helper collision renames and centralizing duplicate date formats in AppTimeFormatters. See docs/audit_registry/consolidation_candidates.json.

pending.title: Inventory primary actions by cardinality and scope
pending.summary: Define every primary user action as not allowed, singleton, unbounded, or domain-bounded. Initial policy and audit are in docs/action_cardinality_policy.md. Next pass should turn that table into a maintained action inventory, then audit rapid duplicate taps and unbounded collection display behavior.

pending.title: Generate Dart CallableRequest classes from contracts/
pending.summary: Callable request generator migration is on watch. tool/contracts/generate_schema_contracts.mjs emits typed Dart callable request classes from contracts/callables/ and detects callable schemas whose wrapper contains a patch-like fields object. UpdateUserProfilePatch is generated from contracts/patches/update_user_profile.schema.json and UpdateClubPatch is generated from contracts/callables/update_club_payload.schema.json into lib/core/schema_contracts/generated/callable_request_dtos.g.dart; the old domain paths remain compatibility exports for existing callers. Generated patches preserve nullable-field sentinel semantics, enum .name serialization, DateTime -> millis for dateOfBirth, callable-safe serialization of embedded profile photo objects, typed ClubHostDefaults serialization, and `toCallableJson()` wrapper payloads. CreateEventCallableRequest, UpdateEventCallableRequest, CreateClubCallableRequest, CreateEventReviewCallableRequest, and UpdateEventReviewCallableRequest now come from generated code. CreateEventCallableRequest and CreateClubCallableRequest use typed nested/domain fields such as EventMeetingLocation, EventPolicyBundle, EventFormatSnapshot, EventSuccessDefaults, EventConstraints, CreateEventPrivateAccess, and ClubHostDefaults; generated toJson() owns the wire shape. Feature-local adapters now translate domain models into generated constructors without hand-written create-event detail DTOs. Pure feature-local re-export barrels are retired; feature-local callable DTO files remain only where they own response decoders, custom normalization, or feature exceptions. Hand-written request DTOs remain only where they add behavior the generator intentionally does not synthesize: EventBookingCallableRequest and CreateRazorpayOrderCallableRequest trim inviteCode; PlacesAutocompleteCallableRequest flattens LocationCoordinate bias; response decoders remain hand-written by design. Keep on watch when adding new callable schemas or removing the remaining behavioral wrappers.

pending.title: Generate Dart freezed domain classes from contracts/firestore/
pending.summary: 32 freezed domain classes in lib/**/domain/ hand-mirror their JSON Schemas. test/core/domain_fixture_parity_test.dart catches Class.fromJson(fixture) failures but the classes themselves remain parallel sources — a schema field added today produces no Dart compile error. Build a generator that emits json_serializable annotations, @TimestampConverter, Dart enum types, and equality semantics, one Dart file per schema. Hand-written derived getters (Event.distanceMiles, Club.isOwnedBy, etc.) move to extension files. Done when no hand-written *.dart exists for the 32 covered classes (only _$Foo parts) and adding a schema field auto-extends the Dart class without manual edits. Multi-day epic; revisit when the team has bandwidth for a clean sweep.

pending.title: Retire functions/src/shared/firestore.ts Admin SDK Timestamp overlay
pending.summary: Implemented 2026-05-25. The Dart-derived Functions overlay is retired: tool/contracts/generate_schema_contracts.mjs now emits functions/src/shared/generated/firestoreAdminTypes.ts as the schema-derived Admin SDK Timestamp projection, all Functions imports moved from ../shared/firestore to ../shared/generated/firestoreAdminTypes, functions/src/shared/firestore.ts was deleted, and the old Dart generator plus firestore_ts_overlay.json were removed. tool/check_data_contract.sh now relies on the schema generator check, and check_schema_type_boundaries.mjs guards against reintroducing the deleted overlay or legacy imports. Keep on watch when adding Firestore schemas or Admin SDK document type imports.

pending.title: Enforce contracts/storage size + content-type limits client-side
pending.summary: Implemented 2026-05-25. ImageUploadRepository now preflights all six client upload helpers (uploadUserPhoto, uploadUserProfilePhoto, uploadClubCover, uploadClubProfileImage, uploadEventPhoto, uploadChatImage) against mirrored contracts/storage content-type and max-byte rules before calling Storage putData. Oversize and non-image failures throw StorageUploadPreflightException with the failed constraint and storage contract resource. uploadEventPhoto now writes under the event_images contract path clubs/{clubId}/events/{eventId}/{fileName}. test/image_uploads/image_upload_repository_test.dart covers valid uploads plus oversize and wrong-content-type rejections for every helper, reading x-storage-max-bytes and x-storage-content-type-pattern from the storage schema files rather than hard-coded test constants. Keep on watch when adding new storage schemas or upload helpers.

pending.title: Retire legacy profile photo arrays after app-version floor clears
pending.summary: Implemented locally 2026-05-25 after the app-version floor was set to Remote Config min_version 1.0.1. Remote cleanup completed 2026-05-26 across dev, staging, and prod; verification dry-runs reported changed: 0 afterward. The one-time cleanup tool was retired on 2026-06-02. Keep on watch only to avoid reintroducing photoUrls/photoThumbnailUrls/photoPrompts as canonical fields.

pending.title: Continue swipes → profileDecisions rename from dual_write to retire_old
pending.summary: Implemented locally 2026-05-25 and remotely cleaned 2026-05-26. A collection-group legacy-source validation found 11 dev and 138 prod legacy swipes; missing current docs were backfilled into profileDecisions, then 11 dev, 0 staging, and 138 prod legacy swipes were deleted. Post-cleanup verification reports zero legacy swipes in all environments. The one-time parity, backfill, and cleanup tools were retired on 2026-06-02.

pending.title: Migrate run-specific profile fields to activity-generic shape
pending.summary: Implemented locally 2026-05-25 with activityPreferences.running as the product shape. Remote cleanup completed 2026-05-26 across dev, staging, and prod; it backfilled nested running preferences and deleted root pace/preferred/runPreferencesVersion fields. Verification dry-runs reported changed: 0 afterward. The one-time cleanup tool was retired on 2026-06-02. Dart fromJson retains legacy root-field tolerance as a watch guard only.

pending.title: Introduce typed Dart DTOs for callable Function boundaries
pending.summary: Replace high-friction ad hoc callable maps and response casts with generated Dart DTOs plus feature-local adapters only where they add behavior. Events, clubs, payments, reviews, safety, places, and user-profile callables now have generated/request DTOs validated against JSON Schema by test/core/callable_dto_contracts_test.dart. Profile inline editors pass typed UpdateUserProfilePatch objects through ProfileEditController instead of constructing ad hoc field maps; the Razorpay order / free-event signup Functions handlers validate against their dedicated generated payload schemas instead of the generic EventIdCallablePayload helper; and SuvbotRepository tests validate both requestSuvbotDemoOperation payloads and listSuvbotDemoActions responses against generated schemas. Most request classes now come directly from lib/core/schema_contracts/generated/callable_request_dtos.g.dart; create-event and create-club generated requests own typed nested/domain object serialization. Generated profile and club patch helpers now own their callable wrapper payloads through toCallableJson(). Hand-written code remains only where it adds boundary behavior the generator intentionally does not synthesize, such as invite-code normalization and location-bias flattening. Keep on watch when adding new callable schemas.

pending.title: Fix profile tab and preview tab blank rendering
pending.summary: The null-profile blank branch now renders an explicit missing-profile state, profile canonical spacing is migrated, and ProfileScreen currently uses NestedScrollView with native TabBarView paging for the Edit/Preview tabs. Normal Edit Profile field edits now expand inline inside the profile list instead of opening bottom sheets; the old profile field bottom-sheet file was removed, nullable single-choice editors keep no chip selected for null values, and regression tests cover inline save/error/pending states. Normal text Profile rows now edit in the row value slot instead of stacking a separate text field below the row, using ProfileInlineEditableText so active values preserve closed-row typography and position with cursor plus text-width underline feedback rather than a boxed field. Profile inline chip editors no longer repeat their row label, nullable single-choice chips can be cleared by tapping the selected chip again, single-choice chip changes now wait for the shared Cancel/Done footer before saving, and selected enum chips now render in the row value slot while expanded so the option list only shows available alternatives. Inline profile drawers now open/close through the shared animated disclosure shell, including dynamic body-height changes for chip edits. The drawer body now preserves full width while animating vertical reveal/fade so action rows do not slide sideways, and the shared inline editor panel owns padding, save errors, and trailing Cancel/Done placement. The Profile header now exposes only Settings; review history, payment history, and sign out live in Settings account rows. The Profile NestedScrollView overlap contract is explicit in code. Profile Preview now bridges both upward scroll from the internal profile card and leading overscroll at the card top back to the outer Profile header, so upward drags pin the Edit/Preview tabs before the card scrolls and downward overscroll reveals the Profile header again. Keep PROFILE-001 on watch pending live device confirmation.

pending.title: Align onboarding and edit-profile field coverage
pending.summary: Shared profile validation now covers name, required display name, date of birth, phone, optional email, optional Instagram, height bounds, and open-ended age display/storage. Onboarding initializes `displayName` from first name and explains that first name starts the public display name while last name stays private. Edit profile exposes `Display name` as the first editable About field and keeps identity fields (date of birth and gender) readonly. Public profile rendering prefers `displayName`, then first name, then legacy full-name first token, so last name is not shown publicly. Profile inline editors now save before collapsing and show mutation loading/error feedback, and their save boundary is typed with UpdateUserProfilePatch instead of ad hoc field maps. All nullable single-choice edit fields have no-selected-chip coverage when empty; domain decode preserves omitted optional enum fields as null; `ChipField` has a direct empty single-select rendering test; immediate-save single-choice editors show a visible saving state; failed single-choice saves clear optimistic pending selection before showing inline error; and expected save-failure widget tests override a silent ErrorLogger so caught fake repository failures do not clutter CI output with stack traces. Remaining field coverage is intentionally asymmetric: onboarding captures only low-friction signup fields (name, date of birth, phone, gender, interested-in genders, Instagram, photos, pace range, preferred distances, and running reasons), while edit profile additionally exposes email, height, bio, city, age range, occupation, company, education, religion, languages, relationship goal, drinking, smoking, workout, diet, and children. Do not expand onboarding with those optional fields unless product explicitly accepts the added signup friction.

pending.title: Polish shared public-facing profile surface
pending.summary: The older shared `ProfileCard` path has been replaced by `ProfileSurface`, a cardless renderer shared by Catches, Profile Preview, and Public Profile. Catches passes contextual section reactions and the floating pass action; Preview/Public Profile render the same content without reaction controls. The next polish pass should use docs/public_profile_overhaul_tracker.md as the temporary product tracker, verify on device, add visual regression coverage, and avoid reintroducing deck/card chrome unless product explicitly reverses the current direction.

pending.title: Review and refresh profile golden baselines
pending.summary: The 2026-06-15 pump-helper cleanup left golden harness behavior equivalent, but `flutter test test/goldens/profile_view_test.dart` fails with large profile baseline diffs. Visual inspection shows current renders include readable profile pill labels while checked-in masters still show blocked placeholder/redaction bars. Do not blindly update baselines; review the current profile surface, confirm the readable labels are intended, then regenerate the profile golden files with visual approval.

pending.title: Add optional sound to full-screen celebration moments
pending.summary: Full-screen celebration moments now share `CatchCelebrationScreen` and `CelebrationEffectsController`, with haptics enabled by default for run creation, run signup/payment confirmation, participant self-check-in, and matches. Sound is intentionally deferred. When product is ready, add sound through `CelebrationEffectsController` only, choose app-owned audio assets/package, respect mute/silent/accessibility expectations, and keep widget tests deterministic through an injected fake effects controller.

pending.title: Apply callable rate limits consistently
pending.summary: Closed on 2026-05-06. `verifyRazorpayPayment`, `cancelRunSignUp`, `joinRunWaitlist`, `blockUser`, `unblockUser`, and `requestAccountDeletion` now enforce shared `checkRateLimit` before expensive or destructive work. `updateUserProfile` is now configured and enforced at 60/minute so field-by-field profile edits remain ergonomic while write loops are bounded. Watch future callables for the same App Check + auth + Zod validation + rate-limit ordering.

pending.title: Complete backend-owned notification fan-out
pending.summary: Core producer work is complete and this queue is now watch-only. Durable in-app activity lives in backend-owned `notifications/{uid}/items/{notificationId}` docs. Match, message, new-club-run, run signup, waitlist-promotion, upcoming run reminder, run schedule/location update, and run cancellation producers are implemented through Functions/callables. Activity reads `watchActivityNotificationsProvider(uid)`, users can only read own timeline plus mark items read, and push delivery is gated by granular user preferences. Club updates use a two-tier model: active membership receives Activity updates, while per-club `runClubMemberships/{clubId_uid}.pushNotificationsEnabled` plus `prefsClubUpdates` gates FCM pushes. Remaining notification work is cancelled-run display/copy QA, settings/permission UX refinement, and device QA, not a missing core fan-out gap.

pending.title: Define run cancellation policy and host UI
pending.summary: `cancelRun` and `deleteRun` are now exposed from Host Manage with confirmation UI. `cancelRun` writes cancellation state, releases schedule locks, attempts completed attendee refunds, refreshes next-run projections, and sends durable/push cancellation notifications to signed-up and waitlisted participants. `deleteRun` is visible only when no activity is known and is still rejected by the backend for runs with participations, payments, or reviews. Keep this item on watch for payment/refund edge cases, cancelled-run display QA across list/detail/calendar/activity surfaces, and copy refinements.

pending.title: Retire relationship arrays in favor of edge documents
pending.summary: Relationship/action documents are now the source of truth for run-club memberships, run participations, saved runs, and match-scoped messages. The retired relationship arrays have been removed from Dart models, generated Functions types, Cloud Functions writes, Firestore rules/indexes, active validation/migration tooling, and active tests. Canonical parent docs retain only aggregate projections such as `memberCount`, `bookedCount`, `waitlistedCount`, `checkedInCount`, and `genderCounts`. Keep this item on watch for regressions: do not re-add relationship arrays to models, Functions, rules, active tooling, or tests.

pending.title: Simplify Firestore rules after relationship-doc migration
pending.summary: Rules were simplified alongside relationship-array retirement: direct run and run-club writes are denied, saved-run/profile projections are gone, swipe eligibility uses `runParticipations`, review create/update/delete moved behind callables, and retired array fields are no longer valid schema. Remaining simplification work is narrower: confirm all public surfaces use `publicProfiles`, keep `users/{uid}` owner-readable only, decide whether active `runClubMemberships` should stay publicly readable for member-list product needs, and consider whether chat message create/reset unread should remain the final direct product writes.

pending.title: Add seeded tests and count validation for relationship migration apply
pending.summary: Relationship-document migration apply was completed before this cleanup pass, and the one-time relationship migration tool was retired on 2026-06-02. Keep this item on watch only for regressions that reintroduce relationship-array storage or require a new migration-specific validation gate.

pending.title: Rewrite deletion and anonymization around relationship-doc queries
pending.summary: Core deletion/anonymization is now relationship-doc aware. Account deletion queries runClubMemberships, runParticipations, savedRuns, reviews/payments, matches, swipes, public/private profiles, Storage, notifications, blocks/reports, and Auth. Run cancellation/delete and run-club archive/delete policies exist through backend callables. Keep this item on watch for product requests to delete historical runs/clubs beyond the currently implemented cancel/archive/delete-unused policies.

pending.title: Audit retained tab and route streams for lifecycle ownership
pending.summary: Known Firestore listener lifecycle issues are resolved and this queue is now watch-only. Dashboard booked-runs and run-club streams no longer use idle Stream.timeout, and no remaining lib `.timeout` usage targets Firestore snapshot listeners. Home pauses booked-runs while inactive, AppShell no longer prewarms the Explore stream, Explore/Catches/Chats/Profile tab roots gate screen-owned providers while inactive, run-club stream families are autoDispose, and route-owned providers for run detail, chat messages, match detail, payment history, and blocked users have auto-dispose tests. Keep shell-level streams only when they drive shell-wide UI such as auth, current user, connectivity, FCM, or unread badges. Future realtime streams must be auto-dispose, retained-tab gated, or explicitly documented as global/prewarmed with read-cost rationale.

pending.title: Create and migrate to branded app error surfaces
pending.summary: The canonical branded app-facing error primitive family now exists: `CatchErrorState`, `CatchErrorScaffold`, `CatchSliverErrorState`, `CatchInlineErrorState`, `showCatchErrorSnackBar`, `ErrorBanner.fromError`, and `appErrorDescriptor` / `appErrorMessage` / `appErrorTitle`. The 2026-05-12 backend error hard migration added `BackendErrorContext`, `withBackendErrorContext`, `withBackendErrorStream`, `normalizeBackendError`, `backendErrorMessage`, `backend_operation_failed` analytics, and `tool/audit/backend_error_candidates.dart`; deleted the Firestore/Auth/run-booking-specific message wrappers; and migrated Auth, Firestore, Functions, Storage, FCM, local cache, location, external share/link, payments, and repository/controller boundaries. The completion pass classified the old flat scanner `review=153` queue as `review=0`, `verified=80`, `intentional=29`, `fixture=56`, and `migrated=148`. `docs/error-handling-audit.md` is now the active source of truth. Keep `dart tool/audit/backend_error_candidates.dart --json` at `mustMigrate=0` and `review=0`.

pending.title: Finish app-wide error management beyond backend wrappers
pending.summary: Create the app-wide error-management layer described in docs/error-handling-audit.md version 2.6.0. The next pass should design a non-backend operation-context API, add a scanner for frontend/local/provider/plugin/global error candidates, classify scanner output into mustMigrate/review/verified/intentional/fixture/migrated buckets, then migrate validation, local persistence, route/deep-link parsing, platform/plugin side effects, provider/mutation UI, uncaught async callbacks, and framework/global reporting until the scanner is clean. Do not start ad hoc candidate fixes without making the scanner and this backlog item the source of truth.

pending.title: Close remaining match and chat audit follow-ups
pending.summary: The match preview contract is now backend-owned and the chat list uses one thread preview per match. The 2026-06-15 formatter cleanup moved chat tile relative timestamps onto AppTimeFormatters so match/chat presentation no longer owns direct intl date constructors. Remaining follow-ups still need focused passes: inspect and clean seeded duplicate match/message data for the active phone account, run device QA on the Chats list and thread, decide whether to replace the current matches-count badge with a real presence model or rename it, polish chat tile width/separators/surfaces against shared spacing primitives, keep the new-match horizontal rail queued for product implementation, and audit chat image/media moderation plus profile thumbnail backfill in real data. Do not treat synthetic duplicate data as a UI bug until Firestore documents and seed scripts are inspected.

pending.title: Enforce non-overlapping events for clubs and users
pending.summary: Implemented on 2026-05-09 and deployed to dev, staging, and prod on 2026-05-26. Event creation and host schedule edits enforce non-overlapping active events per club. User sign-up and waitlist joins enforce non-overlapping signed-up/waitlisted user schedules. The overlap model is half-open, so 2:00-3:00 and 3:00-4:00 are allowed. Existing data without schedule locks is still protected by transactional event/participation queries; deterministic per-minute clubScheduleLocks and userEventScheduleLocks protect concurrent writes going forward. Host time edits are rejected once signed-up, waitlisted, or attended participation edges exist so user schedule locks cannot be mass-rescheduled into inconsistent state. Lock backfill remains optional for observability because the query fallback protects existing data.

pending.title: Expand shared client/server business constants
pending.summary: Initial generated constants now cover run duration, schedule-lock slot size, self-check-in windows, self-check-in distance, and host attendance windows. Continue consolidating duplicated literals as touched: age bounds, profile text limits, price/capacity/distance limits, report text limits, rate-limit policy exposure, media upload limits, and swipe/match eligibility windows. Do not move purely visual constants into this file; this is for product/business invariants that cross the Flutter and Functions boundary.

pending.title: Keep docs index and registry synchronized
pending.summary: Whenever a durable doc owner is added, renamed, archived, deleted, or assigned a new recurring rule, update docs/README.md, doc_versions.json, doc_summaries.json, rules.json, and any affected owner doc in the same pass.

pending.title: Decide post-publish host event edit policy
pending.summary: Current Host Manage exposes a limited published-event edit route for operational fields only: unlocked schedule, meeting point, pinned starting point, extra directions, distance, pace, and description. Product intentionally deferred whether photo replacement, title, capacity, price, admission/event policy, or invite setup should be editable after publishing. Before exposing those fields, decide host notification copy, refund/payment implications, schedule-lock behavior, event-policy snapshot migration, invite-code safety, and photo replacement moderation/storage rules.

pending.title: Unify top-level tab header and first-content spacing
pending.summary: Screenshots on 2026-05-12 showed repeated spacing drift between title/subtitle, pinned search/tab controls, and first content on Chats, Clubs, Home, Catches, and Profile. Keep long-title composability through explicit CatchSliverHeader height contracts, but centralize the shared title padding, subtitle-to-control gap, pinned search/filter row padding, tabbar-to-content gap, and control-to-first-card gap instead of tuning each screen separately. Fold the 2026-05-12 scanner follow-ups into this queue when in scope: raw TextField candidate in location picker and tappable/semantics candidates in photo slot/location picker.

pending.title: Add Razorpay webhook + reconciliation sweep + pending order doc
pending.summary: FLAGGED INFRA (needs deploy). No Razorpay webhook exists, so a payment captured after the client times out is never reconciled (charged-but-unbooked). Add a signature-verified onRequest webhook (payment.captured/order.paid) mirroring stripeWebhook, write a 'pending' payments doc at order creation keyed by orderId, and a scheduled sweep for captured-but-unverified orders. Client mitigation (10-min timeout + sheet clear) already shipped in lib/payments/data/payment_repository.dart.

pending.title: Distinct non-recoverable refund state + alert (Razorpay + Stripe)
pending.summary: FLAGGED (schema). A failed automatic refund is recorded with status 'completed' (only signUpFailed:true) with no recovery path. Add a distinct terminal status (needs_manual_refund/refund_failed) + structured alert/metric; covers verifyRazorpayPayment, stripeWebhook, cancelEventSignUp, mutateEvent refund loops.

pending.title: Gate public review writes + count only verified reviews in club rating
pending.summary: FLAGGED PRODUCT/SECURITY. createPublicClubReview accepts fully unauthenticated writes that poison club rating aggregates (syncClubReviewStats counts unverified reviews), diverging from the verified-attendee trust model. Decide: require auth/verified attendance, and/or aggregate only verified reviews. Also moderate review comments/reviewer names/host responses.

pending.title: Moderate at write boundary so push + preview never leak blocked content
pending.summary: DONE (build+test green, redaction regression test added): onMessageCreated now runs the synchronous moderateText filter and redacts blocked content in BOTH the FCM push body and the denormalized lastMessagePreview, so banned content cannot leak even though the stored doc is redacted by a separate (racing) moderateChatMessage trigger. REMAINING (FN-MOD-001 broader): moderate public review comments / reviewer names / host responses (REVIEW-TRUST-001).

pending.title: Make account deletion re-entrant and compensated
pending.summary: requestAccountDeletion runs destructive Storage delete before multi-batch Firestore + Auth delete with no compensation or tombstone re-entry guard; count decrements double-apply on retry. Gate decrements on the tombstone, keep edge-flip+count-delta atomic, and order durable Firestore work before irreversible Storage/Auth deletes. (storagePath cross-user deletion already hardened.)

pending.title: OTP re-verification flow to allow phone edits
pending.summary: FLAGGED PRODUCT. Phone is now display-only (lib/user_profile/.../profile_tab.dart) because editing it diverged Firestore from the Auth identity. To re-enable editing, add an OTP re-verification flow that updates the Firebase Auth phone credential before accepting the new number.

pending.title: Extract shared withEventReceipt() and apply to all triggers/webhooks
pending.summary: DONE: extracted shared withEventReceipt() primitive (functions/src/shared/eventReceipts.ts) using an atomic create() claim; generalized the contracts/firestore/function_event_receipts schema (handler enum + optional message fields) and regenerated. Applied to onMatchCreated (push now guarded against redelivery; redelivery regression test added). REMAINING: apply to moderatePhotoOnUpload (.add() auto-id duplicate flags) and the future Razorpay webhook (PAY-WEBHOOK-001); invite paidCount increment.

pending.title: Move denormalized count mutations into source-read transactions
pending.summary: DONE (build+lint+332 functions tests green): markEventAttendance and selfCheckInAttendance now read the participation edge and apply the checkedInCount delta inside one db.runTransaction, conditioned on the in-transaction status (idempotent on the signedUp->attended edge; no double-count). Ported a runTransaction FakeFirestore into markEventAttendance.test.ts. GAP: selfCheckInAttendance has no direct unit test (no harness existed) — add one. invite paidCount transactionality still pending.

pending.title: Roll out canonical error surfaces across ~27 client sites
pending.summary: PRODUCTION SITES DONE (verified, flutter analyze clean + tests green): saved_events, calendar, safety blocked-accounts, host team remove/transfer, host_operations create-profile, host_event_manage invite links, profile_screen photo upload, rich_share_card_sheet, dashboard recommendations, stride/weekly (DashboardSectionModel now carries the error object), plus force_update + swipe (Batch A). REMAINING: in-dev event_success companion mutation surfacing (feedback/wingman/live cards/reveal) + host _ErrorText -> ErrorBanner (lower priority); low-severity Image.network errorBuilder gaps folded into LIB-IMAGE-PRIMITIVE-001.

pending.title: Systematic run->event copy-corruption sweep + golden
pending.summary: The automated run->event rename corrupted user-facing copy beyond the cited sites (fixed: compatibility.dart, run_tags.dart x2, swipe_hub). Do a full sweep distinguishing corruption from intentional product renames (e.g. contracts/catalogs/profile_prompts.json 'A perfect event with me looks like...' / 'Tell runners what kind of event' is a half-applied rename to decide on), and add a copy golden.

pending.title: Introduce CatchNetworkImage and migrate ~16 raw Image.network sites
pending.summary: Create a caching + decode-sized + errorBuilder network-image primitive and migrate the ~16 raw Image.network sites (person_avatar, profile_photo_editor, event_recap thumbnail, etc.).

pending.title: Consolidate whereIn fan-out + batched providers; remove N+1
pending.summary: DONE: extracted the triplicated private _chunks<T> helper (clubs/events/saved_event repositories) into one shared lib/core/firestore_chunks.dart#chunkedForWhereIn (encodes the whereIn-10 limit). Verified: analyze clean + 410 client tests green. REMAINING: the larger whereIn fan-out + merge-stream machinery (event_repository.dart) is still duplicated across two event repositories — extract a shared merged-stream helper; and per-tile/sequential profile reads (reviews_history, event_recap, blocked list) still need batched providers.

pending.title: Remove remaining dead code and no-op conditionals
pending.summary: DONE (verified, analyze clean + 372 tests green): deleted dead files event_pin_renderer, eligibility_step, chat_search_field; deleted dead classes DashboardEmpty (relocated _steps to live DashboardEmptySliverBody), EventCapacityProgress (+ stale test assertion), ErrorMessageWidget (+ fixed stale AsyncValueWidget doc); collapsed 4 no-op conditionals (mutation_error_snackbar_listener latent MutationState-as-error bug, onboarding progressTotal, auth_input displayPhoneNumber, catch_meta_row isLast, catch_select_menu chevron). NOTE: event_discovery_repository "dead any arm" is REQUIRED for switch exhaustiveness (false positive, left as-is). REMAINING (lower value / need intent): instagram_page unreachable (maybe intentional in-dev), analytics taxonomy (needs product intent), chat_controller resetUnread, country_markets currencyMinorUnitFactor, app_shell_keys.offlineNotice, location_coordinate.isValid, chat_list_tile _UnreadCountPill plural arm.

pending.title: Fix client read-modify-set, non-atomic batch writes, and orphan-on-failure
pending.summary: DONE: activity_notification markAllRead now commits one atomic WriteBatch instead of N best-effort Future.wait updates. REMAINING: event_success plan/preference/compatibility read-modify-set -> partial update (in-dev, last-write-wins race); create_event_controller + chat sendImage orphan documents/images on failed retry; write_review_sheet has no client-side length cap (backend enforces 1000; CatchTextField lacks a maxLength param — add one).

completed.title: Backend hardening: idempotency receipt + atomic counts + moderation leak + rate-limit
completed.summary: Shared withEventReceipt() primitive (+ generalized receipt contract) guarding onMatchCreated push; markEventAttendance/selfCheckIn atomic checkedInCount; onMessageCreated push+preview moderation redaction; checkRateLimit default-fallback warning. Verified: functions build + lint clean + 332 unit tests green. You deploy.

completed.title: Rate-limit registration visibility
completed.summary: checkRateLimit now logger.warns (once per instance per action) when an action falls back to DEFAULT_RATE_LIMIT with no explicit RATE_LIMITS entry, surfacing silent loose-limit registrations. Verified: functions build + 331 unit tests green.

completed.title: Deep-audit high-severity client fixes + storagePath security
completed.summary: Fixed 11 high-severity client findings (Razorpay timeout+sheet-clear, cancelled-event calendar leak, swipe failure surface, profile-prompts soft-lock, phone display-only, force-update openStore guard, directory keyed mutation, Apple Health stuck state, run->event copy x11, ScrollableProfile dead-code cluster deletion) and hardened cross-user Storage deletion in updateUserProfile + accountDeletion. Verified: flutter analyze clean, 314 client tests + 15 profiles tests green. Full inventory in docs/audit_registry/deep_semantic_audit_2026-06/.

completed.title: Generate and consume tiny profile thumbnails for run hype avatars
completed.summary: Added backend profile-photo thumbnail generation with a dry-run/apply backfill script, shared `PersonAvatarStack`/obscured avatar support, `RunHypeAvatarStack` provider-owned participant selection from `runParticipations` plus `publicProfiles`, blurred hype avatars in Dashboard next-run and Run detail, and thumbnail-first normal avatars in Chats and match celebration surfaces. Chat image uploads now use the shared `ImageUploadRepository` policy instead of duplicating picker/storage logic.

completed.title: Unify high-emotion success moments under full-screen celebrations
completed.summary: Added `CatchCelebrationScreen` and `CelebrationEffectsController`, migrated host run creation, free and paid user signup confirmation, participant self-check-in, and match creation to full-screen celebration surfaces, and kept host attendance out of the celebration flow. Added an injectable `RunCheckInLocationService` seam so self-check-in remains testable without platform location plugins.

completed.title: Split Home into Dashboard and Activity tabs
completed.summary: Home previously followed the Profile-style tab architecture. `DashboardScreen` owned the route-local `TabController`, `NestedScrollView`, collapsible Home header, pinned `Dashboard`/`Activity` tab row, and native `TabBarView` paging. This was superseded on 2026-05-16 by `HOME-NOTIFICATIONS-001`, which removed the Home tabs and promoted Activity to a Notifications route.

completed.title: Replace Home activity tab with Notifications screen
completed.summary: Removed the Dashboard/Activity tab row from Home. `DashboardScreen` now renders a single sliver-owned Home surface with a top-right Notifications bell and red unread badge. The former Activity timeline is available as a Home-branch child route titled `Notifications`, keeps the app bottom navigation visible, hides the manual `Mark all read` action, and marks unread notifications read automatically when opened.

completed.title: Audit remaining feature tappable candidates
completed.summary: Reviewed the 24 syntactic tappable candidates. Existing controls already had user-visible text, tooltips, or Semantics wrappers, so the useful fix was scanner refinement. The scanner now reports zero unresolved tappable candidates.

completed.title: Piecemeal legacy spacing migration
completed.summary: Migrated all canonical 4-point Sizes.p* presentation/widget candidates to CatchSpacing.s*. The scanner now reports zero canonical candidates; fine-grained p2/p6/p10/p14/p18 compatibility helpers remain watch-only.
